title: indices.get_data_stream_mappings

name.description: A comma-separated list of data streams or data stream patterns. Supports wildcards (`*`).

master_timeout.description:
The period to wait for a connection to the master node. If no response is
received before the timeout expires, the request fails and returns an
error.

description:
Get data stream mappings.

Get mapping information for one or more data streams.
